productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men St Truck Black Cap
description: Created using 90% cotton and 10% elastane, this cap from adidas is a perfect blend of comfort and style. Crown made of a cotton/elastane blend fabric with a mesh back made of 100% nylon to offer breathable comfort to the head Curved visor with stitch detailing for enhanced durability Graphic print and brand logo in rubber print on the front Branding embroidered and appliquéd on the mesh back Fabric covered button on the top of the cap for style Adjustable plastic back strap in flourescent orange for a customised Fit Cap care Hand wash in cold water Do not tumble dry or dry clean
